feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Schema in Document Information Extraction for Create Sales Order - Automatic Extraction (4X9)
entry.content:
I have set up scope item 4X9 Create Sales Orders - Automatic Extraction in my S/4HANA 2023 Private Cloud environment. When uploading the purchase order PDF, there are corrections I would like to make that I have actioned in the Document Information Extraction application on BTP. I have corrected the fields, associated the document with the template, and assigned the template to schema SAP_purchaseOrder_schema.

When I upload the PDF in the Document Information Extraction UI, I can select this schema and the template is applied correctly. 

However, when using the UI in S/4HANA, in this case the "Create Sales Order - Automatic Extraction" fiori app, the document shows up in Document Information Extraction UI but it shows the message

"Schema associated with this document has been deleted."

Is this expected behaviour? Is it possible to associate this app "Create Sales Order - Automatic Extraction" (Scope item 4X9) with a particular schema for Purchase Orders? Or perhaps change the association in Document Information Extraction to use the schema SAP_purchaseOrder_schema when the inbound document is a Purchase Order, which is correctly identified in the header.

The plan I have selected in BTP for Document Information Extraction is the basic plan, not the premium plan.

Any guidance is much appreciated.

entry.title: The field MARA-MSTAE, MARC-MMSTA, MARA-MSTAV, MVKE-VMSTA
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I would like to understand if fields MARA-MSTAE, MARC-MMSTA, MARA-MSTAV, MVKE-VMSTA is blank in S/4 system what will be the impact and why is it mandatory when moving from ECC to S4 system.

 

Thank You

entry.title: Eclipse ADT - 'Apply Pseudo Comment' is not working for ATC finding
entry.content:
Hi Community,

actually we are perfoming the custom code migration for S/4HANA. We are using the ABAP Development Tools (ADT) in Eclipse to execute ATC checks and applying quickfixes. There is also a functionallity to apply a pseudo comment for an ATC finding, if available. But this function doesn't work. Nothing happens on execution.

Eclipse and ADT are on the latest Version. Does anybody faced the same issue and has an idea to fix this?

Thanks very much for responses.

Best regards,
Christoph

entry.title: Not option of Country- India in "Mass Upload Utility" app for HSN Creation at Private Cloud,
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

We are trying to create HSN code at  at Private Cloud by using  "Mass Upload Utility" app, there is not option of Country "India", How to add Country Country "India" while uploading HSN master ?

Thanks,

Ganesh Bhosale
@Ganesh_Bhosale555 ; @suhas_barge ; @kriti_daga

entry.title: Change report painter period parameter transferred to RKPEP000
entry.content:
Hi,

I am facing a problem about report painter and called up report RKPEP000, if you have any idea about this case , could you please advise? Thanks.

The report painter report is created in group 6P3 which is related to WBS element. When I executed the report, it shows the first screen and then I double click the line at the screen and the second screen displays(The second screen is the called up report RKPEP000).

At the first screen, a column is "balance by the first-half of current year", it shows the data of below two parts:

For example, current year is 2024, the first part is "period 1~12, year 1900~2023" and the second part is "period 1~6, year 2024". There is no problem at the first screen, but at the second screen, the report shows data of "period 1~12, year 1900~2024", the period 7~12 year 2024's data should not be showed.

The reason is that the parameter transferred to the second screen is combined, so the period is 1~12.

Is there any method can solve this problem? I want to show the correct data at the second screen.

entry.title: Purchase order & Purchase Requisition Release Strategy: for multiple order currency
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

I am working on a project involving two company code enterprise structures. These two company codes have different local currencies (e.g., Company A uses KES, and Company B uses MMK), with USD as the group currency.

I am facing an issue with the currency conversion exchange rate in the Purchase Order currency.

For the release strategy, I have made the following configurations:

  • Configured the release strategy by maintaining the Purchase Order net order value CEKKO(GNETW) [Characteristic currency is USD], Purchase Order Type CEKKO(BSART), and Plant CEKKO(EWERK).

Now, when I create a Purchase Order with a third currency (EUR) for Company A, the system, according to SAP Note FAQ 493900 Q.13, converts the order currency into the company code currency and then from the company code currency into the release strategy currency (EUR > KES > USD).

The exchange rates maintained in OB08 are as follows:

  • Exchange rate type: M
    • 1 EUR = 134.02 KES
    • 1 KES = 0.0077 USD

Release Strategy Configuration:

  • Release Strategy 1: PO net order value ≤ 100.00 USD
  • Release Strategy 2: PO net order value > 100.00 – 150.00 USD

Issue:

I created a Purchase Order in EUR currency with a net order value of 99.00 EUR.

The system should convert this value as follows:

  • 99.00 EUR = 13,266.99 KES
  • 13,266.99 KES = 102.69 USD

Based on the above currency conversion, Release Strategy 2 should be triggered. However, the system is triggering Release Strategy 1 instead. I tested this multiple times with different close values to the two release strategies, but I continue to face inconsistent currency conversion, leading to the incorrect release strategy being triggered.

My question to you all:

Is the system using a different exchange rate type(apart from M) for the conversion between the order currency > local currency > release strategy characteristic currency?

#SAP MM # PO RELEASE STRATEGY # SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Two cost lines same tax code split tax line
entry.content:
Hi,

our company code in China has the following request:

Vendor posting with FB01

Line 01: 34 Vendor   10.000

Line 02: 40 Cost GL  8.490,56 Tax code J3 6%

Line 03: 40 GL Cost 943,40 Tax code J3 6%

Line 04: 40 VAT GL 6% 566,04

The requirement is, to split the line 04 based on the values in line 02 and 03 - so we want to have instead one line on the tax GL in this case two lines with the same GL and same tax code. It should be an 1:1 relationship between the cost line and the tax line, so means for each cost line with VAT 6% we want to generate a new tax line with 6% in the same FI-document.

 

Thanks!

entry.title: To call a Custom screen in RF transaction /SCWM/RFUI, between Step PIMTTO and PIPHLU for Picking
entry.content:
The requirement is to add a custom screen in between the RF transaction Steps, to validate the input entry before going to the next screen. 

I have - 

1. Created a custom screen

2. Added a logical transaction and configured it in the system for this, along with the step details

 

Please help me with the process I should follow for a custom screen addition with buttons.

entry.title: "Cannot Analyze Certificate" Error While Importing .p12 Certificate in SAP
entry.content:
While attempting to import a .p12 certificate into the SAP system, the following error was encountered:

"Cannot analyze certificate."

This issue indicates that SAP is unable to process the .p12 file format directly. As an alternative approach, we can convert the .p12 certificate into a format compatible with SAP.

Alternative Approach: Convert P12 to PEM

1. Extract the Certificate

Run the following command to extract the certificate from the .p12 file:

openssl pkcs12 -in certificate.p12 -nokeys -out cert.pem

This command extracts the public certificate from the .p12 file and saves it as cert.pem.

2. Extract the Private Key

Use the following command to extract the private key:

openssl pkcs12 -in certificate.p12 -nocerts -out key.pem

This extracts the private key and saves it as key.pem.

3. Import the PEM Files into SAP

Once the cert.pem and key.pem files are extracted, you can attempt to import them into SAP.

Would this be the correct approach to successfully import the certificate?

entry.title: Deliveries marked for archiving with report /SCDL/BO_ARCHIVE still visible in EWM system
entry.content:
After marking an SAP Extended Warehouse Management delivery document (PDO, FDO, ODR, PDI, IDN, SPC, WMR, PMR) for archiving (Status "For Archiving" - DAC), using the report /SCDL/BO_ARCHIVE or /SCDL/BO_ARCHIVE_STD, the system still shows the document in Delivery Processing transaction codes (/SCWM/PRDI, /SCWM/PRDO...) or in the Warehouse Monitor (/SCWM/MON), even if using the data source as "Database".

If the delivery was closed using the "Close Unfinished Deliveries" Check Monitor (/SCWM/CHM_LOG) tool, or it has a minor status inconsistency, the Check Monitor tool "Delivery Status (Only Check) and/or "General Delivery Status" may show the message "Doc. cat. &1 and status type &2 are inconsistent for &4 items" (/SCWM/CCHECK601), indicating the system found an inconsistency.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Consumption reversal fails from CO13 for missing entry in /SCWM/TIMBWA. Reason CSMO not determined.
entry.content:
In S/4HANA 2023, the consumption reversal (262) triggered via CO13 fails with error message "No entry found in table /SCWM/TIMBWA for key I" /SCWM/WM_SEL 009. 

The system search an entry in the /SCWM/TIMBWA with Reason blank and Direction I and finds nothing.

The Reason should be " CSMO - Consumption to Order".

EWM is embedded and synchronous movements are active.

How can I solve it?

entry.title: SHD0 - Personal settings of ME52N transaction variant
entry.content:
Good day, 

 

We have a requirement to create a transaction variant for ME52N in SHD0. One of the requirements is to remove the "Personal Settings" button. However, we noticed that the personal setting (Item overview as grid control) in the actual ME52N is still affecting the variant. 

 

Is there a way to set a global setting for this so that whenever the user uses the variant, the "Item overview as grid control" is still unticked?

 

Or

 

Is there a way to set a default value for "Item overview as grid control"?

 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: SAP HCM S/4Hana Examination Inquiry
entry.content:
I am trying to access C_THR12_2311 examination for certificate. It's asking me to subscribe for the yearly plan of USD 1,332. 

Is there any cheaper alternative than subscribing for the yearly plan? Thank you.

P.S: I've found two exam chances for $250~ but not available for individuals.

entry.title: Moving Average Price changing after procurement of free goods
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts 

I have a client requierement to not update the moving avec rage price of a material in case of free goods, 

I did the bellow test in SAP, and in the PO 3, the moving average was significately changed, what are the SAP good practices related to managing moving average and free goods

1- Is there any way (in standard config) where the moving average is not updated after free goods acquisition

2- what is the operationnal sap best practice related to dealing with free goods in logistic process, do I create a seperate materia code to deal with thos material in order to keep the moving average correct, do we cretae a seperate material type for them. What are the best SAP practices please to propose to a client regarding that ?

 

 MaterialPriceQtyMoving Average 
PO 1M000710010100 
PO 2M0007902093,33 
PO  3 : Free GoodsM00070 gratuit4040Moving Average Updated when procuring free goods

Thank you so much 

Regards, 

Aicha

entry.title: SAPFM06P - BADI_MM_PO_OC_EMAIL for S4CORE 107 and SAPSCRIPT
entry.content:
Dear all,

we are using standard SAPFM06P as program for email output of SAPSCRIPT forms out of purchase orders. By standard only partner function "VN" can be used as recipient, but we want to use a different partner function (which analogous is possible on SD side).
I found SAP note 217371 with BADI_MM_PO_OC_EMAIL and method CHANGE_RECIPIENTS which would basically facilitate our needs. Unfortunately this badi is only available for S4CORE up to 101 (we are using 107) and only for ADOBE (we are using SAPSCRIPT). I wasn`t able to find any other notes suggesting other solutions.

Do you know of any alternative badi/ solution available for our version and SAPSCRIPT

Thanks a lot and BR
Lukas

entry.title: SUM DMO with S/4HANA conversion
entry.content:
Hi,

In an upcoming project we have to bring a HCM system which is currently running on Windows and MSSQL to Linux and HANA. In addition to that the system should also be converted from ECC to S/4HANA. I looked up some information on DMO and only found a help article where this option is mentioned in connection with hyperscalers.

Does anybody have experience with this scenario and tell me if DMO with all those requirements is possible to do in an on-premise landscape?

 

Best regards,

Alex
